Description: The Shock has no effect on the Character and they are relieved.
Rules: This Die rolls minimum and therefore Relieves 1 point of Shock from the Character or Descendant without incurring any additional costs.

Description: The Shock stuns the Character (or the Descendant) for a moment.
Rules: This Die rolls an Odd number, but not the minimum or maximum, and Relieves 1 point of Shock by converting it into 1 Global Reaction Time.

Description: The Shock causes distress or trauma to the Character or Descendant. Shock can in this way alter Characters and Descendants, adding Stress coping mechanisms and changing their behaviour.
Rules: This Die rolls even, but not the minimum or maximum and Relieves 1 point of Shock by forcing the Character (or User / Yarn-Teller) to play one card from their Pool or Hand as a Stress Card. If the Character or Descendant has enough Stress to match the Pips of the Stress Card then they may take the Stress Effect of that card. If a Character or Descendant does not pay this Stress Effect then the card will be treated as a Trauma.

Description: The Shock has an Overwhelming effect on the Character, this stuns the Character but offers no relief.
Rules: This Die gains 1 point of Global Reaction Time and 1 additional Stress or Shock.

Description: The Shock has Dramatic repercussions, potentially raising the Stakes, or forcing a change of Suspense Level.
Rules: This Die rolled a Score greater than the current Stress stored on the Die, in addition to any other effects it immediately adds one Dice to the Drama Pool.
